close_reason: Added fetchGit and mkGitSpec for Foundry/Solidity git dependencies
description:
Modify nix/lib/deps-cell/fetchers.nix to add fetchGit type for Foundry git dependencies.

Should support:
- repo URL
- rev (commit hash)
- sha256 hash

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Add git fetcher to deps-cell fetchers
